THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR JUL-03-2008 IS GRANTED. PER ORDER: EFFECTIVE AUG. 1, 2008, $45.00 SHALL BE GARNISHED FROM MS. MCGRAY'S PAY CHECK ONCE A MONTH (THE PAYCHECK ISSUED ON THE 20TH OF EACH MONTH) UNTIL A TOTAL OF $370.00 HAS BEEN DEDUCTED. COPIES OF ORDER SENT TO ALL PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF DEPT.
